title: Toffee Signal
lore: A focus groove sent through a sticky delay chain — Black Toffee kept the drums crisp so the bass could stretch without smearing the workday.
artistPersona: Afro-house producer with syrup-thick basslines, sunset percussion, and late-night rooftop warmth. Grooves feel handmade, polished, and sweet without becoming sugary.
albumConcept: Black Toffee pours afro-house over sunset rooftops: hand drums, warm sub bass, and chant hooks that stick like caramel on the dancefloor.
